also_known_as: マイルズ ケイトン
biography:
Miles Caton (born March 3, 2005) is an American actor and musician. Caton is known for his role as Sammie in the 2025 horror film Sinners, for which he was nominated for the Critics' Choice Award for Best Young Performer.

name: Miles Caton
